2026-04-24T02:03:16.6444165Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-04-24T02:03:16.6444733Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-04-24T02:03:16.6445180Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-24T02:03:16.6445607Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-24T02:03:16.6446387Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-24T02:03:16.6446907Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-04-24T02:03:16.6447240Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-04-24T02:03:16.6447536Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-04-24T02:03:16.6447982Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-04-24T02:03:16.6448325Z [36;1mfi[0m
